name: resemblejs
when_to_use: 要「给两张图片(data URL/File/URL/ArrayBuffer),直接得到差异分析 + 可视化 diff 图」而不想自己搞 ImageData 时用它。追求极致速度或已有像素缓冲的底层场景用 pixelmatch。
why_valuable: turnkey 图像对比:自动加载解码,输出 misMatchPercentage、差异包围盒、尺寸差,并生成粉色高亮 diff 图,可忽略抗锯齿/仅比亮度;原生 AI 做不到「这两张截图差多少、差在哪」。

data_in.note: turnkey:image 接受 data URL / File/Blob / ArrayBuffer / ImageData,内部离屏 canvas 自动解码;异步经 onComplete 回调出结果。ignoreX 必须在 onComplete 前链式设定。

schema.image1: string | Blob | ArrayBuffer | ImageData —— 图 A(data URL / 文件 / 缓冲 / ImageData)
schema.image2: string | Blob | ArrayBuffer | ImageData —— 图 B
schema.ignoreAntialiasing?: boolean —— 忽略抗锯齿差异,默认 false
schema.ignoreColors?: boolean —— 仅比亮度(忽略色彩),默认 false

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;计算 + 产 diff 图 dataURL。
provides.outputs: onComplete(res) 的 res:misMatchPercentage(字符串百分比)、rawMisMatchPercentage、isSameDimensions、dimensionDifference{width,height}、diffBounds{top,left,bottom,right}、analysisTime,及 res.getImageDataUrl()(粉色高亮 diff 图 dataURL)、res.getBuffer()。

api_surface.globalWarning: resemble.outputSettings({errorColor,errorType,transparency,outputDiff,boundingBox,ignoredBox}) 会改全局模块状态,影响后续所有比较

peer.note: 本条 turnkey、自动加载解码;若已有 RGBA 像素缓冲、追求极致速度用底层 pixelmatch。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you want to supply two images (data URL/File/URL/ArrayBuffer) and directly receive difference analysis plus a visual diff image without managing ImageData yourself. For maximum speed or low-level cases where pixel buffers already exist, use pixelmatch.
en.why_valuable: Turnkey image comparison: it loads and decodes automatically, returns misMatchPercentage, difference bounds, and dimension differences, and generates a pink-highlighted diff image. It can ignore antialiasing or compare luminance only. Native AI cannot reliably answer how much two screenshots differ and where.

data_in.note: Turnkey input: image accepts data URL / File/Blob / ArrayBuffer / ImageData, and an internal offscreen canvas decodes it automatically. Results arrive asynchronously through onComplete. Chain ignoreX before onComplete.

schema.image1: string | Blob | ArrayBuffer | ImageData -- image A (data URL / file / buffer / ImageData)
schema.image2: string | Blob | ArrayBuffer | ImageData -- image B
schema.ignoreAntialiasing?: boolean -- ignore antialiasing differences; default false
schema.ignoreColors?: boolean -- compare luminance only (ignore color); default false

boot.note: 异步:ignoreX 必须在 onComplete 之前设。resemble.outputSettings({errorColor,outputDiff,boundingBox,...}) 改全局状态、影响后续所有比较,慎用或每次重设。浏览器用原生 canvas,node-only 'canvas' 依赖在浏览器 bundle 非硬依赖。

isolation.evidence: +esm default export `resemble`(grep: 'Qe as default');API resemble(image).compareTo(image2).onComplete(cb),链式 ignoreColors/ignoreAntialiasing/ignoreNothing/scaleToSameSize/repaint(README)及 resemble.compare(img1,img2,options,cb)。onComplete data 字段对 +esm 源码逐一核实:misMatchPercentage、rawMisMatchPercentage、isSameDimensions、dimensionDifference、diffBounds、analysisTime、getImageDataUrl、getBuffer 全部存在。headless:+esm grep document.head=0、document.body=0——内部经 document.createElement('canvas')(1 处,从不 append)建离屏 canvas 并操作 ImageData(10 处);node-only 'canvas' 依赖在浏览器 bundle 非硬依赖。CAVEAT:resemble.outputSettings({...}) 改全局模块状态、影响后续所有比较(README 明示)——按次设或避免。无 shadow 足迹(headless-primitive)。
